cit.basis: Flat 18% CIT on taxable profit for general companies.

special_rates.banks_note: Banks taxed at 25% (raised from 18% effective the 2024 tax year, retained for 2025). A temporary 50% rate applied to banks for 2023 only.

cit.note: Administered by the State Tax Service of Ukraine. Insurance and gambling activities have separate regimes; verify current wartime rules.

simplified_single_tax.note: Micro/small businesses may elect the simplified single-tax system (Groups 1-4), replacing CIT with a turnover- or unit-based single tax. Group 3 general rate is 5% of turnover (non-VAT) or 3% (VAT-registered). Out of scope for this CIT estimator.

wartime_levies.note: Wartime budget measures (increased military levy, temporary sector rates) have applied since 2022. From late 2024 the personal military levy rose to 5%. Confirm current corporate applicability with the State Tax Service.

vat.note: Standard VAT (PDV) rate 20%; 7% for certain medicines/medical goods; 0% on exports.

wht.note: 15% default withholding on certain Ukraine-sourced income of non-residents, subject to tax treaties.

personal_income_tax.note: Flat 18% PIT plus military levy (5% from late 2024).

sources.name: State Tax Service of Ukraine (Derzhavna podatkova sluzhba)

metadata.caveat: AI-ESTIMATED: These rates and thresholds were generated by an AI model and have NOT been verified against primary legislation. Ukraine's wartime fiscal regime changes frequently. Verify every figure against the State Tax Service of Ukraine (https://tax.gov.ua/) and a local advisor before any filing or production use.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; fiscal calendars and wartime transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified AI estimates for LedgerField.
Simplified single-tax election, wartime levies, WHT, and sector rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.

official_sources.name: State Tax Service of Ukraine (Derzhavna podatkova sluzhba)
